content.claim: The Public Education Strategy 2021–2030 names comprehensive interventions for vulnerable student groups including socially disadvantaged students and children with SEN as a priority target area, reflecting stated government policy intent; however, no retrieved source provides interim (2021–2026) evaluation of outcomes against this strategy's integration targets.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Policy statement reflects intent rather than demonstrated implementation
No interim evaluation of effectiveness available in retrieved sources
Open empirical question whether strategy outputs are matching stated SEN/disadvantage-integration targets
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
